_comment: Pharos routing config — controls max_tokens per task type for cost efficiency. All inference routes through Pharos smart router (pharos-auto model). Checked by noir-cron-wrapper.sh at runtime.
_note: Ollama decommissioned Mar 23. All tasks now route through Pharos which picks the cheapest capable model (Haiku 4.5 for simple, Sonnet for medium).

tasks.description: Lead enrichment text analysis — parse website copy, extract contact signals, score leads
tasks.rationale: Structured extraction from known HTML/text. Pharos routes to cheapest model.

tasks.description: Cold email and outreach draft generation from a lead profile or brief
tasks.rationale: Template-driven generation. Nex Labs voice is fixed. Low token cap saves cost.

tasks.description: News article summarization and formatting for breaking-news and daily digest
tasks.rationale: Summarization of structured text. High volume, low complexity.

tasks.description: Git commit message generation from diff or change description
tasks.rationale: Short output, deterministic format. Minimal tokens needed.

tasks.description: Simple text formatting, parsing, and transformation tasks
Log file summarization and anomaly flagging from system or app logs
tasks.rationale: Pattern recognition in structured text. Medium complexity.
